nameEn: IEEE/CVF Conference on Computer Vision and Pattern Recognition
description: The most prestigious conference in computer vision and pattern recognition, recognized as top-tier across all of AI. It covers the full spectrum of CV including object recognition, segmentation, 3D vision, and generative models, with thousands of papers presented annually. It ranks among the highest CS venues by h-index.

bestPapers.paperTitle: Learning to Solve Hard Minimal Problems

Rich Human Feedback for Text-to-Image Generation

descriptionKo: 컴퓨터비전 및 패턴인식 분야의 최고 권위 학회로, AI 분야 전체에서도 최상위급으로 인정받는다. 객체 인식, 영상 분할, 3D 비전, 생성 모델 등 CV 전반을 아우르며, 매년 수천 편의 논문이 발표되는 대규모 학회다. h-index 기준 CS 전체 학회 중 최상위권에 위치한다.
descriptionEn: The most prestigious conference in computer vision and pattern recognition, recognized as top-tier across all of AI. It covers the full spectrum of CV including object recognition, segmentation, 3D vision, and generative models, with thousands of papers presented annually. It ranks among the highest CS venues by h-index.
